calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Pay Transfer Fees
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Bruce J. Quilligan of Doyle Schaler McMahon, Tel. No. 1-949-727-7077 appearing
for the Defendants by telephone appearance;
No other appearance on the matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendants U.S. Healthworks Medical Group and Don Simpson's motion to dismiss for failure to pay transfer fees is granted. No opposition filed. Per CCP 339, this case is dismissed without prejudice due to the failure of plaintiff Bruce Shannon to pay transfer fees and no other lawsuit may be commenced in another court on the claims alleged by Mr. Shannon unless and until he pays the order requiring him to pay transfer fees. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2018 Continued To Jul-10-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Continued To May-01-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Self-represented Plaintiff Bruce Shannon, appearing on his own behalf. Bruce J. Quilligan, Esq., appearing for Defendants Don Simpson and U.S. Healthworks Medical Group. The OSC is re-set to May 1, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2017 Continued To Mar-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Self-represented Plaintiff Bruce Shannon, appearing on his own behalf. Plaintiff was instructed to complete transfer and advise that any relief from Order to Transfer must be sought in Department 302. The OSC is re-set March 6, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-21-2017 Continued To Nov-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Self-represented Plaintiff Bruce Shannon, appearing on his own behalf. The OSC is re-set to November 28, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Depatment 610. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2017 Continued To Jun-20-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2017 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-11-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2016 Continued To Mar-01-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue Of Defendants U.S Healthworks Medical Group And Don Simpson
Off Calendar Sep-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS DON SIMPSON AND U.S. HEALTHWORKS MEDICAL GROUP'S Motion To Change Venue to Santa Clara County is GRANTED. The declaration of Don Simpson shows that he resides in Santa Clara County, U.S. Healthworks Medical Group is based in San Jose, and the incident occurred in San Jose. There is no basis for venue of this case in this county. The plaintiff shall pay all transfer fees. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
